OpenHardwareMonitor
Source: https://github.com/HardwareMonitor/OpenHardwareMonitor
Release: https://github.com/HardwareMonitor/OpenHardwareMonitor/releases/tag/3.0.9585

Upstream licensing notice preserved from the official repository README:

"This program is free software: you can redistribute it.

This program is distributed in the hope that it will be useful, but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE."

Notes:
- The upstream repository README includes the license notice above.
- The default branch metadata does not currently expose a standalone root LICENSE file.
- This plugin vendors only the official release executable for optional local CPU temperature enhancement on Windows.
